name: patch-writer
description: Write Morphe patches — fingerprints, patch logic, and constants from analysis findings

agentSpawn.command: echo '--- Existing Patches ---' && find paresh-patches/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/paresh/patches/ -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | xargs -I{} basename {} || echo 'No patches yet'

postToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'paresh-patches/patches/src.*\.kt'; then cd /home/kali/github/morphe/paresh-patches && ./gradlew buildAndroid 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

welcomeMessage:
Patch Writer ready. Give me:
- Analysis findings (findings.md or describe the target)
- Smali method signature and instruction sequence
- App package name and version

I'll create the Fingerprints.kt, Patch.kt, and Constants.kt files.
